title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
